title: Experiences of migrants and employers using eVisa (2022)
body: "This 2022 survey asked migrants and employers about their awareness and usage of eVisas, usage of the online right to work checking service, ease of use, views on communications around eVisas and awareness of legislation changes.  This research was commissioned by the last Conservative government, prior to 5 July 2024 "
